name: Pecan Cinnamon Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, sugar, brown sugar, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon into a mixing bowl.
2. In a small bowl, combine the egg, oil, and milk; blend well.
3. Add the liquid ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir just enough to moisten.
4. Stir in the pecans. Spoon the batter into greased 2 1/2-inch muffin pan cups, filling each about two-thirds full.
5. Bake at 400 degrees F (200 degrees C) for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Serve hot with butter and homemade jelly or jam.
